user.title: Fuel Finder
user.description:
Configure Fuel Finder to monitor fuel prices near your Home Assistant location.

Radius is measured in {radius_unit} (max {max_radius}).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to fuelaround.me. Check your internet connection.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. The API may be slow or unreachable.
error.cloudflare_blocked: API blocked by Cloudflare. Try again later or check if the site requires a browser.
error.invalid_api_data: Unexpected data format from fuelaround.me. The API may have changed.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Check the logs.
error.invalid_radius: Radius must be a whole number.

abort.already_configured: Fuel Finder is already configured for this location.

init.title: Fuel Finder Options
init.description:
Update your Fuel Finder settings.

Radius is measured in {radius_unit} (max {max_radius}).
